title: Gamingecke Create 2026
description: Create with addons and Quality of Life features.
body:
Gamingecke Create 2026 is a comprehensive tech and building modpack centered around the Create mod. It combines complex automation, immersive engineering, and breathtaking world generation with essential performance and quality-of-life tweaks for a smooth, highly engaging Minecraft experience.

### Features
- **Engineering and Automation:** The heart of the pack. With Create and its many addons, you'll construct sprawling machinery, design complex train networks using Steam 'n' Rails and Railways Navigator, generate power via Diesel Generators and Crafts & Additions, extract resources with Ore Excavation, and automate everything from food processing (Central Kitchen, Slice & Dice, Confectionery, Bitterballen) to experience management through the Enchantment Industry.
- **Technology and Logic:** Keep your factories running precisely with advanced redstone circuits via Project Red Transmission and fully programmable computers thanks to CC: Tweaked.
- **Building and Decoration:** Give your industrial empire a personality. Create Deco, Interiors, Copycats+, Vibrant Vaults, and Bells & Whistles offer a wealth of architectural options to make every build your own.
- **World Generation:** Tectonic delivers breathtaking, completely overhauled landscapes, while the YUNG's Better series breathes fresh life into familiar vanilla structures.
- **Performance:** Even the most complex contraptions run smoothly, thanks to Sodium, Lithium, ImmediatelyFast, FerriteCore, and Dynamic FPS keeping framerates stable and servers healthy.
- **Immersive Atmosphere:** Shaders give the world a stunning visual overhaul, while Sound Physics Remastered and Create: Sound of Steam add realistic acoustics and authentic mechanical audio to round out the experience.
- **Navigation and Mapping:** Xaero's Maps makes exploration effortless, and Distant Horizons pushes your view distance far enough to take in your factories and Tectonic's landscapes in their full scale.
- **Information and Claiming:** JEI keeps even the most complex recipes manageable, Jade provides detailed block and entity information at a glance, Lighty highlights mob-spawnable areas, and Open Parties and Claims keeps your hard-built factories safe from unwanted visitors.
- **Quality of Life:** Sophisticated Backpacks, Inventory Essentials, and Mouse Tweaks make managing your inventory a breeze. Carry On lets you relocate functional blocks with ease, Zoomify gives you precise zoom control, and Not Enough Animations adds a layer of polish to character movement.
- **Communication and Social Features:** Simple Voice Chat enables direct in-game voice communication, Chat Heads makes it easier to identify who's talking in chat, and Sit lets players kick back and relax between build sessions.
- **Utilities:** Auto Reconnect Reforged automatically reconnects you to the server after a disconnection, so you can get back to building without the hassle of logging in again.

### Notes

- It's recommended to increase the amount of allocated memory, otherwise Distant Horizons may display warnings.
- Created for [Gamingecke.space](https://discord.gamingecke.space/) but available to anyone seeking a expanded Create experience.
